title: v5.040 failed to build on i386 arch
body:
What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
 verilator 5.040

What OS and distribution are you using?
Debian sid

verilator failed to build on i386 arch, below is the relevant build error:
```
ccache g++ -g -O2 -ffile-prefix-map=/builds/electronics-team/verilator/debian/output/source_dir=. -fstack-protector-strong -Wformat -Werror=format-security -g -O2 -ffile-prefix-map=/builds/electronics-team/verilator/debian/output/source_dir=. -fstack-protector-strong -Wformat -Werror=format-security  -Wdate-time -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wdate-time -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2  -O3 -DVERILATOR_INTERNAL_ -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP  -Wno-shadow -Wno-unused-parameter -faligned-new -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/usr/share/verilator\" -include V3PchAstNoMT.h -c ../V3DfgCache.cpp -o V3DfgCache.o
In file included from ../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:19:
../V3Dfg.h: In instantiation of 'const T& DfgVertex::getUser() const [with T = long long unsigned int]':
../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:676:51:   required from here
  676 |         if (pair.second && vtxp->getUser<uint64_t>() == m_component) {
      |                            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~
../V3Dfg.h:841:29: error: static assertion failed: Size of user data type 'T' is too large for allocated storage
  841 |     static_assert(sizeof(T) <= sizeof(UserDataStorage),
      |                   ~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
../V3Dfg.h:841:29: note: the comparison reduces to '(8 <= 4)'
../V3Dfg.h: In instantiation of 'void DfgVertex::setUser(T) [with T = long long unsigned int]':
../V3DfgBreakCycles.cpp:1103:40:   required from here
 1103 |                 selp->setUser<uint64_t>(vtxp->getUser<uint64_t>());
      |                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
../V3Dfg.h:856:29: error: static assertion failed: Size of user data type 'T' is too large for allocated storage
  856 |     static_assert(sizeof(T) <= sizeof(UserDataStorage),
      |                   ~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
../V3Dfg.h:856:29: note: the comparison reduces to '(8 <= 4)'
make[4]: *** [../Makefile_obj:412: V3DfgBreakCycles.o] Error 1
```

Complete build log is at: https://salsa.debian.org/electronics-team/verilator/-/jobs/8173217/raw

      |                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

      |                   ~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
